channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: If you totted up the sums for every financial scandal in British politics (£2k per parliamentary question for cash-for-questions, £200k for Johnson’s No 10 renovation, the cost of that very nice campervan) even with s...
item.description: If you totted up the sums for every financial scandal in British politics (£2k per parliamentary question for cash-for-questions, £200k for Johnson’s No 10 renovation, the cost of that very nice campervan) even with s...

item.title: BBC Politics: Josh Simons stood down for Burnham as Labour was 'imploding'
item.description: Josh Simons stood down for Burnham as Labour was 'imploding'

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Incidentally, while confident Burnham wins Makerfield, I think this from @stephenkb.bsky.social is right about the impact of a defeat. Would make the last few weeks for Labour seem like happy times. www.ft.com/content...
item.description: Incidentally, while confident Burnham wins Makerfield, I think this from @stephenkb.bsky.social is right about the impact of a defeat. Would make the last few weeks for Labour seem like happy times. www.ft.com/content...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
item.description: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer loyalist warns against ‘copying Tories’ but admits PM is unpopular
item.description: Starmer loyalist warns against ‘copying Tories’ but admits PM is unpopular

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Gilts Slump as Investors Brace for Burnham Challenge to Starmer - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Gilts Slump as Investors Brace for Burnham Challenge to Starmer - Bloomberg.com

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK bosses hit out at impact of Westminster turmoil on business
item.description: UK bosses hit out at impact of Westminster turmoil on business
